programme.title: World's Greatest: Archipelagos
programme.desc: The romantic notion of island life has always attracted us. Explore the histories, cultures, and unique ways of life on the World’s Greatest Archipelagos - clusters of islands that share common bonds of geography, geology, and genealogy.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Monuments & Landmarks
programme.desc: Many of the world’s most significant manmade wonders serve not as dwellings, but as powerful signposts. But more than giving us direction, they tell us a story - they characterize powerful forces, or commemorate power lost.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Timeless Cities & Towns
programme.desc: These cities and towns are special places where the past coexists with the present, creating cultures totally unique to their people and their part of the world and adhering to ancient traditions and while introducing modern innovations.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Nations
programme.desc: Though many are small in stature, they have punched well above their weight on the global stage. Some are rooted in ancient history, while others are only just beginning to realize their full potential.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Rivers
programme.desc: Rivers flow freely - beautiful and powerful waterways that underscore the melody of life. As they meander through the landscape, they shape it, wearing down ranges and deepening valleys, eventually flowing out into the sea.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Marine Animals
programme.desc: From the surprises of colorful reef characters to effervescent penguins, killer sharks, and regal whales, dive into the places where nature reveals itself in some of its most marvelous and bizarre forms.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Cruises
programme.desc: There is something seductive about setting sail. Cruises offer us a chance to dip our toes into the 70% of our planet awash with oceans, rivers, and lakes, exploring places that can only be reached by daring to leave the shore.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Nearshore Islands
programme.desc: Some of the world’s greatest islands are so close that they blend in with the mainland. But regardless of their size and origins, they are often the islands we are drawn to the most, each forging their own unique identity.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Capital Cities
programme.desc: With visionaries, politicians, and activists, these metropolises are defined as the official seats of government. Dublin, Washington, and Taipei share broad avenues, museums, and monuments, but are as varied as the countries they represent.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Global Cities
programme.desc: Travel to the centers of wealth, power, industry, and innovation. From London to Tokyo, Hong Kong to New York, these are the cities that never sleep. The influence held in these economic hubs unites the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Grassland Animals
programme.desc: Grasslands are the great stages of the natural world where large animals play out spectacular lives in clear view of people, including lions, leopards, elephants, rhinoceros, cheetahs, impalas, kangaroos, wallaby, potoroo, bison, and wolves.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Iconic Buildings
programme.desc: In construction, only a few buildings can be groundbreaking. Vastly different in shape, size, and function, these diverse buildings prove there is no recipe for greatness, just the fundamental ingredients of vision, bravery, and imagination.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Flights
programme.desc: Our experience of the world’s greatest marvels is literally and figuratively elevated when we explore them from the air. Whether you travel by air balloon, helicopter, light aircraft, a grand perspective is always guaranteed.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Bridges
programme.desc: A bridge is a structure that’s designed to transcend, but a great bridge can define the place where it stands. Symbols of human ingenuity, beauty, and grandeur, bridges connect us not only to each other but also to the past.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Treks
programme.desc: Every journey made by foot promises a grand adventure. From the highest mountains to the wildest jungle realms, treks venture down the road less travelled, allowing us to connect to nature, history, and culture, one step at a time.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Port Cities
programme.desc: Some of the most stunning cities are port cities - Sydney, Rio, Cape Town - and are also some of the most culturally diverse and vibrant. The great maritime cities of the world bridge countries and continents and unite the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Land Adventures
programme.desc: Most land adventures come with some risk - a chance to confront our deepest fears, resist the pull of the ordinary, and soar into the wild unknown.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Coral Islands
programme.desc: The reef systems that gave rise to coral islands support the vast majority of marine species on our planet, but they are under threat. Explore the delicate balance between exploiting and preserving these extraordinary natural wonders.

programme.title: Arthur: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal
programme.desc: D.W. and Bud embark on an epic wilderness adventure--the backyard has never been so exciting! Apple picking, bake sales, craft classes…there's so much to do in Elwood City in the fall! And Ladonna's determined to do it all.
programme.sub-title: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal

programme.title: Arthur: All Thumbs/Kidonia
programme.desc: When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.title: Arthur: Binky's Music Madness/Brain Freeze
programme.desc: Everyone loves the Bang on a Can All-Stars, a funky experimental music group that's touring around Elwood City. Everyone that is, except Binky. A new ice cream shop has just opened up across the block. Will Brain's shop be able to survive?

programme.title: Arthur: Caught in the Crosswires/Framed
programme.desc: Muffy is thrilled when mega producer J3 chooses her family for his latest reality TV project. After all, she was born to be star! Buster has just won the best young artist award at the Elwood City Arts Festival.

programme.title: Arthur: Molina's Mulligan/Buster Bombs
programme.desc: Alberto discovers he has a natural talent for golf and begins to compete, but will his dad's embarrassing cheers make him give it up? Buster has lost his flair for funny, and the harder he tries to make people laugh, the worse it gets.

programme.title: Arthur: Opposites Distract/Just the Ticket
programme.desc: Arthur and Buster have always been best friends, but when a leaky roof forces Arthur to study in Buster's room, they discover that they make better friends than roommates. Arthur's ecstatic when he wins free concert tickets on the radio.

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.
programme.sub-title: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite

programme.title: Arthur: Show Off/Dog's Best Friend
programme.desc: It's the Elwood City dog show and Killer is facing off against Sebastian Winkleplotz, the snooty, championship-winning poodle. Arthur agrees to watch Amigo while Alberto's off at camp, but Pal gets worried.

programme.title: Arthur: Speak Up Francine/Waiting for Snow
programme.desc: The local creek is polluted and pesticide run-off is to blame. Francine is determined to get the word out at the annual Earth Day rally. Ladonna can't wait to experience her first blizzard, if only the weather would cooperate.

programme.title: Arthur: The Director's Cut/Crime and Consequences
programme.desc: After meeting his hero, Hollywood director Tufton Sinclair, George is inspired to make a movie of his own. When George accidentally breaks the class's prize woodworking project, Binky gets unfairly blamed.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Read: Super Saver!/Tibbles to the Rescue!
programme.desc: Business is slow for Mr. and Mrs. Read, and Arthur is concerned. Can he find ways to keep his family in the green? When D.W. saves Tommy and Timmy from a nasty fall, they decide to repay the favor…whether D.W. likes it or not.
programme.sub-title: Arthur Read: Super Saver!/Tibbles to the Rescue!

programme.title: Arthur: Best Wishes/The Tardy Tumbler
programme.desc: After George has a lucky streak, his friends pressure him to wish for a snow day. Can George deliver? Prunella's excited about making the gymnastics team, until she realizes practice starts at 6am! Will she practice or snooze?

programme.title: Arthur: Fountain Abbey/Arthur Calls It
programme.desc: Muffy's devastated when she learns her great, great grandmother Mary Alice wasn't royalty, but a common maid. Pressure from his classmates has Arthur doubting his decision to call Buster out during a baseball game.

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur
programme.desc: Fern's been feeling low and no one can figure out why. Luckily, Buster Baxter is on the case! With Arthur out of town, Buster is on the hunt for a new best friend, but he only wants to play games HIS way. Will Buster learn to compromise?
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur

programme.title: Arthur: The Friend Who Wasn't There/Surprise!
programme.desc: Muffy embarks on a quest to find her long lost imaginary friend. And then it's Catherine's 16th birthday, and Francine has been cordially UN-invited to the party.

programme.title: Arthur: The Pageant Pickle/Some Assembly Required
programme.desc: School is almost out and Arthur can hardly wait for those lazy summer days by Muffy's pool. Nothing could ruin such a happy time of year, except maybe D.W.'s Spring Pageant! And then D.W. can't wait to test out her new play set!

programme.title: Arthur: The Tattletale Frog/D.W. & Bud's Higher Purpose
programme.desc: When Bud is blamed for an accident D.W. causes, she has to decide whether to let her friend take the fall. D.W. and Bud can't wait to ride a new rollercoaster. Will they make it past the ticket taker, or will they come up short?
programme.sub-title: The Tattletale Frog/D.W. & Bud's Higher Purpose

programme.title: Arthur: Two Minutes/Messy Dress Mess
programme.desc: Power shifts in the Tibble household when the twins find out Tommy is two minutes older than Timmy. Ladonna's thrilled when Muffy loans her a beautiful recital dress, but a run-in with a painted bench creates a problem.

programme.title: Arthur: Whip. Mix. Blend./Staycation
programme.desc: When Rattles's mom starts dating Archie Vanderloo, Rattles finds himself spending time with his twins, but they don’t have anything in common. Arthur offers to babysit so that his parents can enjoy some peace and quiet in the backyard.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Toy Trouble/Spar for the Course
programme.desc: It's a race to the toy store after Arthur realizes he may have given away his chance at 2 million dollars! Unless Muffy, Buster, and Binky can comprise, they'll be stuck with a boring windmill at the new 18th hole at the mini golf course.
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Toy Trouble/Spar for the Course

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter
programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?
programme.sub-title: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter

programme.title: Arthur: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing
programme.desc: Carl has agreed to play the accordion for George's puppet show. But his routines are getting in the way of rehearsals. Buster enlists Binky's help to keep him from gorging on delicious Tuvaluna cookies. Will Buster's self-control crumble?
programme.sub-title: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing

programme.title: Arthur: Carried Away/Dueling Detectives!
programme.desc: Kate and Mei Lin are thrilled to tour the solar system with Pal's cousin, Dr. Yowl. Wally is missing and Elwood City's best detective is on the case. And that detective is…Binky?!?

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie
programme.desc: When Francine needs money for new soccer cleats, Muffy hires her as a personal assistant. Lydia and Muffy join forces to defeat a mean beauty queen in the Little Miss Crocus" pageant.
programme.sub-title: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie

programme.title: Arthur: Maria Speaks/Postcards from Binky
programme.desc: Maria has always been a silent fixture in Mr. Ratburn's third-grade class. But her time to speak has finally come. Can she fix her stutter? When Binky's grandparents miss his big soccer game, he decides to film a video reenactment.

programme.title: Arthur: Mr. Ratburn's Secret Identity/Besties
programme.desc: Mysterious calls. Superhuman strength. Is Mr. Ratburn secretly a superhero? When Buster and Ladonna bond over a memorable trip to the movies, Arthur feels left out. Has Ladonna taken his place as Buster's best bud?

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Adds It Up/Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: Math, schmath. That's what Sue Ellen thinks… until she runs into a problem her artistic vision can't solve. Sue Ellen can't wait to meet her pen pal in person.
programme.sub-title: Sue Ellen Adds It Up/Wish You Were Here

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Day (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur: Bud's Knotty Problem/That’s MY Grandma!
programme.desc: When Bud falls in love with a snazzy new pair of boots, he might face his toughest adventure yet - learning to tie his shoes. D.W. gets jealous when Grandma Thora becomes the most popular babysitter in town.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Second Chance/Arthur and the Whole Truth
programme.desc: With the help of a little time travel, Buster turns back the clock to see what his life would be like if he were a genius. Arthur isn't happy when he discovers that Buster has been telling him some white lies, just to spare his feelings.
programme.sub-title: Buster's Second Chance/Arthur and the Whole Truth

programme.title: The Battle of Britain: 3 Days that Saved the Nation: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: The 30th August 1940 - the most intense day of fighting.

programme.title: The Battle of Britain: 3 Days that Saved the Nation: The Blitz
programme.desc: The 15th September 1940 - Battle of Britain day.

programme.title: VE Day - Forever in their Debt
programme.desc: Tells the stories of those who experienced the end of the war in all its many forms. It features a wide range of interviews from children who remember the street parties, to the servicemen who remember not having to buy a single drink that day.

programme.title: The Dambusters: Episode 1
programme.desc: Aircrew have eight weeks to train for a top secret mission.

programme.title: The Dambusters: Episode 2
programme.desc: Barnes Wallis has to create an entirely new aiming device.

programme.title: The Dambusters: Episode 3
programme.desc: The raid on Germany's dams gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: How Britain Won WW2
programme.desc: Hidden events that changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows the route taken by prisoner of war Len Harley, who spent months on the run before braving snow, ice, and Nazi patrols to escape over the mountains of the Majella in Italy.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: Operation Galia
programme.desc: Monty’s journey sees him follow the path 33 SAS soldiers took after they were parachuted behind enemy lines to attack the enemy and create chaos to draw Nazi-fascist forces away from the front line.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: A Day of Infamy
programme.desc: December 7th, 1941 Pearl Harbor was attacked by the Empire of Japan. Now the people who were there share their memories of that fateful day.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Lost Tanks of D-Day
programme.desc: In Normandy, June 6, 1944, a dozen Sherman tanks equipped with floats, the famous Duplex Drives (DD), leave their ship to swim to Omaha Beach... not all of them make it.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Last Flight of the B-17
programme.desc: Twenty-six metres beneath the waves at the foot of the majestic Calvi Citadel in Corsica lies an American plane from the Second World War.
programme.sub-title: The Last Flight of the B-17

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: Secret Bunkers of Omaha Beach
programme.desc: On June 6th 1944, Lieutenant-colonel Rudder’s Rangers company climbs the cliffs of the Pointe du Hoc in Normandy with the mission to destroy the German cannons.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Tragic Sinking of Leopoldville
programme.desc: On the 24th of December 1944, 2 237 American soldiers of the 66th Infantry Division are aboard the Steamer Léopoldville.

programme.title: Catfish UK: Emma & Harry
programme.desc: After six months, single mum Emma and online love Harry have already set a wedding date. But the problem is, they've never met. So it's up to the Catfish UK team to track him down. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jarrod & Abby
programme.desc: How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antwane & Tony
programme.desc: Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a three-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Brittany & Bryon
programme.desc: Brittany finds love online with Bryon, a marine who may get deployed again to Iraq, she seeks Nev and Max's help before she runs out of time to discover if the perfect military man is real. (S4, ep19)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeff & Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Kristen
programme.desc: Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen? (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Felipe & Jasmine
programme.desc: Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ramon & Paola
programme.desc: Ramon met Paola on Facebook and established an exclusive online relationship. But after many failed attempts to video chat, is she really who he thinks she is? (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For shy Devan, meeting Rylan was love at first click. Devan wants to believe that Rylan is marriage material but her suspicious behaviour is leaving him with doubts.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Steven & Samm
programme.desc: Steven is due to graduate high school, instead of planning for college he wants to move to California for his online love, Samm. Steven's mom is sceptical of Samm's identity.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Stephanie & David
programme.desc: Catfish brings together couples who've interacted solely through screens. In this edition, Stephanie searches for the man she's been talking to in an unseen episode.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tyler & Amanda
programme.desc: After a year and a half of chatting with her online, Tyler thinks he may have a future with Amanda. But are Tyler's friends correct because they suspect that something isn't right? (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely? (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Anthony & Marq
programme.desc: Anthony is a war veteran who wears his heart on his sleeve. Over a year ago, he bonded online with a caring man named Marq. Today, they're head over heels in love - but what is Marq hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Taylor & Brad
programme.desc: Taylor is falling in love with Brad despite never having seen his face. Can Oobah and Nella find the man of her dreams, and will Taylor get her happy ever after? (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion & Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures?

programme.title: The Hills: Playmates Bring the Drama
programme.desc: Audrina's heartbroken as Brody's girlfriend confronts her about Hawaii, and Brody does nothing to stop it. Heidi sees a text message from Stacie to Spencer and confronts her in a club. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: The Hills: Keep Your Enemies Closer
programme.desc: Justin confronts Audrina about hooking up with Brody. Stephanie ruins a photo shoot at work, and Lauren will have to answer to Kelly. Heidi warns Stacie to stay out of her life. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: The Hills: Father of The Bride
programme.desc: Spencer tries to save his and Heidi's relationship by asking her dad's permission to marry her. Lauren must fire Stephanie, who's heartbroken, as the guy she likes has a girlfriend. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: The City: The Truth Will Reveal Itself
programme.desc: Whitney's world is turned upside-down when a boy from her past shows up to warn her that Jay has been fooling around. Olivia decides that befriending Whitney is her new project. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The City: The L Word
programme.desc: Whitney gets mixed signals from Jay and decides to ask him directly where she stands. Erin's new boyfriend comes to visit and Whitney realizes it's time to find her own apartment. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The City: Good Things Come In Threes
programme.desc: Whitney dates a new guy and Jay confesses to Adam his true feelings about Whitney. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The City: Boys Night Out
programme.desc: Adam lets loose while his girlfriend Allie is out of town, but when she hears he kissed another girl from Whitney and the others, Adam finds himself in hot water. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The City: He Never Said He Had a Girlfriend
programme.desc: Allie breaks down after a run in with the girl who claims she kissed Adam, but Adam sticks to his story to win Allie back, and Whitney gets upset with Jay for taking Adam's side. (S1, ep6)
programme.sub-title: He Never Said He Had a Girlfriend

programme.title: The City: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Kelly Cutrone accuses Allie of being too skinny, and Whitney finds herself caught in the middle. Erin runs into an ex-boyfriend and old feelings begin to return. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: The City: Mingling with the Commoners
programme.desc: Olivia invites Jay's band to perform at one of her charity events but her plan backfires when the band is disrespected on-stage, leaving Whitney and Olivia at odds. (s1, ep8)

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Lola the Bunny
programme.desc: Easter Sunday: Jersey Shore style. Lola the Bunny returns, Angelina and Snooki wreak havoc at a winery, and the roommates enjoy an old-fashioned night out on the boardwalk.The only thing standing in the way of a good time is the beef between Mike & Deena.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Dren
programme.desc: Dren (n): Snooki's alter ego. Pauly and Nikki arrive, and the roommates meet the local wildlife. But the lions and tigers and bears got nothing on Snooki when Dren takes over on Nikki's birthday.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Staten Island Notebook
programme.desc: Dren continues her attack on San Diego. Something is going on between Angelina and Vinny. And, when the roommates take a trip to San Diego's Little Italy, they're surprised to find the ultimate Guido waiting for them - Uncle Nino.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Wild ‘N Out: Jersey Style
programme.desc: Deena's "Family Fun Day" has Angelina struggling in the wake of her failed marriage. Jenni lands in the emergency room. And Nick Cannon and Justina Valentine lead the squad in an impromptu game of "Wild 'N Out." May the funniest guido win!

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Knock Knock! Who’s There?
programme.desc: Water turns into wine and in the blink of an eye, it's pure chaos between Pauly, Nikki, and Angelina.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: VIN DAY
programme.desc: Vinny throws an epic party on the last night of the family vacation, filled with carbs, strip clubs and a late night rendezvous no one saw coming. See ya, San Diego!

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: TV's greatest Italian family returns to the reunion stage and they're not holding back... is Angeliners finally divorced? Is old Sitch gone forever? Tacos and dramers are on the menu in Part 1 of the Jersey Shore Family Vacation reunion!

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: Your favorite roommates aren't done yet! Vinny and Angelina get spicy, the Meatballs embrace their wild side, and tensions get so hot one roommate leaves to cool off. The party continues tonight with Part 2 of the Jersey Shore reunion!

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: What's In the Bag?
programme.desc: After five years apart, our favorite guidos are reuniting in Miami for a family vacation, but The Situation's legal issues have put his vacation in jeopardy.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Ring
programme.desc: In this spectacular episode, Ronnie and Deena's unresolved issues resurface, and the family is complete with the arrival of The Situation.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 221
programme.desc: Lauren is ready to let Daren, her best friend that she likes him. Juan will take the leap and confess to his best friend that he wants to date her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 222
programme.desc: Robin is ready to tell his best friend Chelsey, that he likes her. Tyler's been crushing on his best friend Lauren and is finally ready to let her know.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 101
programme.desc: Connor is in love with his best friend Brittanie and must try to convince her that he should be more than her "shopping partner." Gabby reveals her feelings to her best friend Nick.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 102
programme.desc: Heather must convince her best friend Gary that she's more than "one of the guys", while Kevin tries to prove to Janine that nice guys finish first.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 103
programme.desc: Peter's best friend, Victoria is going off to college and he MUST confess his feelings before she leaves. Christie, a hockey player with Olympic aspirations, must get out of the Friendzone with her best friend Dylan.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 104
programme.desc: Alex wants his best friend Anthony to be his first boyfriend. Dan puts years of friendship on the line to confess his feelings to Katie.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 105
programme.desc: Fitz hopes that confessing his love to his best friend Michelle will lead to love. Shelly thinks that her "clown" persona won't turn off her best friend as she asks him to be her boyfriend.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 106
programme.desc: Jaime has only known Steve for a year but the feelings she has for him make her want to be more than friends. Together Jackie and Frank have lost almost 200 pounds, newly fit Jackie now wants to make Frank her boyfriend.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 107
programme.desc: Jeremy plans a picnic to confess his deep affection for his best friend Amanda. Self-proclaimed ladies' man Nate thinks he's finally found a girl to make him quit his partying ways.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Power and Passion
programme.desc: 48 Hours probes case of Alabama politician Stephen Nodine -- accused in the 2010 shooting death of his mistress, Angel Downs.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death at Soho House
programme.desc: In the relationship between an Oscar-winner's son and his fashion designer girlfriend, one is found dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Raging Son
programme.desc: A cell phone captures the murder of a Weight Watchers executive by a Wall Street lawyer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Preppy Killer
programme.desc: Robert Chambers speaks out after serving 15 years in prison for the 1986 murder of Jennifer Levin.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Secrets
programme.desc: The investigation into the 2008 murder of Juliana Redding, an aspiring actress and model and the subsequent trial. Redding was found dead in her Santa Monica, California home

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation in Texas
programme.desc: A report about the 2011 shooting death of Greg Williams, and the question of whether he was killed with his own gun by an intruder inside his suburban Dallas home - as his wife Michele Williams has claimed - or if Michele herself was guilty of the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Alternate Suspects
programme.desc: A football coach serves nine years in prison for the murder of his wife before a Texas Court of Criminal Appeals finds he didn't get a fair trial.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Driven to Extremes
programme.desc: Authorities investigate a case of love, infidelity, road rage and possible murder in Texas.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Killer App
programme.desc: The dangers of anonymous chat apps; a father discovers his 15-year-old daughter planning to run away with a 30-year-old man she met online; a teenage girl is found stabbed to death after making friends online.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Two women fight to keep the man convicted of killing their mother over 20 years earlier in prison, though he maintains his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Soldier's Wife
programme.desc: A soldier claims the fatal shot he fired into the back of his young wife's head was an accident, but prosecutors say he did it intentionally in a fit of jealousy.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mortician, The Murder, The Movie
programme.desc: When an elderly millionaire is found dead in a freezer, her decades-younger companion is brought up on murder charges; the movie inspired by the story, \Bernie.\
programme.sub-title: The Mortician, The Murder, The Movie

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a beloved Florida doctor reveals his dark, secret past.
programme.sub-title: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz

programme.title: 48 Hours: Eleven Hundred Miles to Murder
programme.desc: Authorities first suspect the husband in the savage murder of a Florida doctor, but when he has an alibi, they follow a tip on a 1,100 mile trip that takes the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: Authorities in Colorado race to catch a serial rapist before he attacks again.

programme.title: 48 Hours: SolveThis Case: Who Killed Kay Wenal
programme.desc: Investigators ask for the public's help to solve the 2008 murder of Kay Wenal, a former model found dead in her home in Georgia.
programme.sub-title: SolveThis Case: Who Killed Kay Wenal

programme.title: 48 Hours: OJ Simpson: Endgame
programme.desc: The OJ Simpson trial for the murder of Nicole Brown Simpson and Ron Goldman, the controversy that surrounded it, the impact it had on race relations, including the current and recent uproar over race, patriotism, and free speech in America.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Love, Hate & Obsession
programme.desc: In the investigation of the murder of a one-time millionaire, both his ex-wife and his son are suspects.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Psychiatrist and the Selfie
programme.desc: The case against Jacob Nolan, who claims his cousin and psychiatrist, Dr. Pamela Buchbinder, brainwashed him into attempting to kill her former lover, fellow psychiatrist Dr. Michael Weiss.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Two men convicted for a brutal rape they say they didn’t commit, and DNA evidence backs them up. How did a law professor, her students and new DNA technology play a part in the case?
