programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Mixed Emotions
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Between a Bush and a Hard Place
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.
programme.sub-title: Cops Between a Bush and a Hard Place

programme.title: COPS: I Always pay my Debts
programme.desc: A man tries to bite an officer after he was spotted with narcotics. Officers respond to a family fighting in their front yard. A man claims he was just paying someone back when he tried to buy drugs.

programme.title: COPS: Mamma's House
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother's house. A drunk driver won't admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Too Many Cooks
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS: Cops What's in the Box
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS: The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car.

programme.title: COPS: Blame my Man
programme.desc: A man runs from police claiming he heard a gunshot. A woman lays the blame on her boyfriend. Officers confront a man who refuses to come down from a roof.

programme.title: COPS: High Speed Golf
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a truck with a trailer full of golf carts. Police question a driver after finding a mask and handgun in his car. Officers are called to a traffic collision involving a semi and an SUV.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.
programme.sub-title: Cops Four Felonies and a Flat Tire

programme.title: COPS: Cops Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS: Rocks in my Socks
programme.desc: Deputies discover a purse and a sock containing paraphernalia during an arrest. Deputies pursue an intoxicated motorcyclist. A woman is suspected of stealing a cake.

programme.title: COPS: Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked.

programme.title: COPS: It's Laundry Day
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son's girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: COPS: Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A runaway motorcycle tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: COPS: And Through the Woods
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight.

programme.title: COPS: Undercover Blues
programme.desc: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting uncovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Bikini Brawl
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: COPS: Uncomfortable Shoes
programme.desc: A driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a motorist with a funny walk is hiding something up his shoe.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Pacific Princess Overtures / Cabin Fever / Gopher, The Rebel

programme.sub-title: Pacific Princess Overtures / Cabin Fever / Gopher, The Rebel

programme.title: The Love Boat: Marooned / The Search / Isaac's Holiday - Part 1
programme.desc: A hurricane devastates the tropical island where a shore party of Capt. Stubing, his crew members, and passengers are held captive by a strange hermit while the Pacific Princess totters under the command of a bumbling deputy captain.
programme.sub-title: Marooned / The Search / Isaac's Holiday - Part 1

programme.title: The Love Boat: Marooned / The Search / Isaac's Holiday - Part 2
programme.desc: In Part 2, the captain and crew are still marooned.
programme.sub-title: Marooned / The Search / Isaac's Holiday - Part 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Rocky / Julie's Dilemma / Who's Who?
programme.desc: Julie's parents arrive on board the Pacific Princess and announce their plans to divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat: A Different Girl / The Man Who Loved Women / Oh, My Aching Brother
programme.desc: A man makes a move on three women; not knowing that they are traveling companions.
programme.sub-title: A Different Girl / The Man Who Loved Women / Oh, My Aching Brother

programme.title: The Love Boat: Julie's Aunt / Where Is It Written? / The Big Deal
programme.desc: Captain Stubing's Uncle Cyrus uses every trick in his devious mind to get Julie alone, until her "Aunt Phoebe" intervenes; a desperate businessman uses his daughter as bait to close a deal.
programme.sub-title: Julie's Aunt / Where Is It Written? / The Big Deal

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Kissing Bandit / The Witness / Mike And Ike
programme.desc: A shy young man becomes a completely different person at night; a businessman who doesn't have time for his family learns a valuable lesson.
programme.sub-title: The Kissing Bandit / The Witness / Mike And Ike

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ship Of Ghouls
programme.desc: A magician keeps his engagement secret in order to dazzle female audiences, while his neglected fiancee turns to Captain Stubing for comfort.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Accidental Cruise / The Song Is Ended / A Time For Everything
programme.desc: In "Accidental Cruise," the executive and his secretary come aboard a bit tipsy, are mistaken for another couple, and assigned the honeymoon suite.
programme.sub-title: Accidental Cruise / The Song Is Ended / A Time For Everything

programme.title: The Love Boat: Chubs / Locked Away / Till Death Do Us Part - Maybe
programme.desc: A ghost experiences jealousy as his mission to find his wife a new husband appears to be succeeding.
programme.sub-title: Chubs / Locked Away / Till Death Do Us Part - Maybe

programme.title: The Love Boat: Tony's Family / The Minister & The Stripper / Her Own Two Feet
programme.desc: Crew members make a valiant effort to keep six stowaways a secret from Capt. Stubing; a church member disapproves of her minister's new romance; a nearly-blind woman refuses to admit her problem until Doc intercedes. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Tony's Family / The Minister & The Stripper / Her Own Two Feet

programme.title: The Love Boat: Heads Or Tails / The Little People / Mona Of The Movies
programme.desc: Two passengers place a bet on who can win Julie's affections first. A son who loves his parents is shocked when he discovers his fiance doesn't.
programme.sub-title: Heads Or Tails / The Little People / Mona Of The Movies

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Folks From Home / The Captain's Cup / Legal Eagle
programme.desc: Doc must perform a risky operation after an accident; one of the ship's laborers is recruited to replace a missing dignitary; a bitterly divorced man has it in for his ex-wife's attorney. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: The Folks From Home / The Captain's Cup / Legal Eagle

programme.title: The Love Boat: El Kid / The Last Hundred Bucks / Isosceles Triangle
programme.desc: A beauty can't choose between Captain Stubing and Doc; a man and his wife return to the ship with an orphaned boy; a hospital executive falls for a seemingly successful businessman. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: El Kid / The Last Hundred Bucks / Isosceles Triangle

programme.title: The Love Boat: Julie Falls Hard / Double Wedding / The Dummies

programme.sub-title: Julie Falls Hard / Double Wedding / The Dummies

programme.title: The Love Boat: Second Time Around / The 'Now' Marriage / My Sister, Irene
programme.desc: Doc's ex-wife hires an actor - who takes his role a bit too seriously - as her fiance; a philandering marriage counselor's wife seeks solace from Captain Stubing; a woman pretends to be her own sister for a reunion with a long-ago sweetheart. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Second Time Around / The 'Now' Marriage / My Sister, Irene

programme.title: The Love Boat: Gopher's Opportunity / Home Sweet Home / The Switch
programme.desc: Gopher quits his job to manage a new hotel; a wealthy eccentric widow books a five-year passage and begins meddling in the crew members' lives; a magician tries to avoid his assistant by sending his brother to perform in his place. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Gopher's Opportunity / Home Sweet Home / The Switch

programme.title: Melrose Place: Devil In a Wet Dress
programme.desc: Billy is haunted by nightmares about Brooke. Michael goes to great lengths to convince Kimberly to move back in with him.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Circle Of Strife
programme.desc: Kimberly is hurt when she receives divorce papers, although they had been filed months before her reconciliation with Michael. Sydney sues Michael and Peter for sexual harassment, and they are forced to appoint her office manager.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Run Billy Run
programme.desc: Amanda agrees to give Billy a raise if he can win a prestigious airline account. He sleeps with a rival executive to get her to reveal their strategy, then uses it to undermine them.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ruthless People
programme.desc: Billy continues to irritate Alison with his win-at-all-costs attitude and boorish behavior. A distraught Matt gets drunk and sleeps with his friend Dave.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Burning Sofa
programme.desc: Bobby is arrested for assaulting Peter, but Sydney later convinces Amanda to have the charges dropped. Peter makes a deal with Billy's client so that he can pay off Alycia and escape her influence.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Triumph Of The Bill
programme.desc: S04E026) Billy uses underhanded means to steal the keynote speech at an ad convention away from Alison. Claire has been hired by Richard to break up Jake and Jane.

programme.title: Melrose Place: What Goes Up, Must Come Down
programme.desc: "Peter, uses his key, to let himself into Amanda's apartment. Sydney daydreams that Bobby's father sends his hitman to convince his son to give up a large sum of money that he has hidden."
programme.sub-title: What Goes Up, Must Come Down

programme.title: Melrose Place: True Fibs
programme.desc: Teri threatens to expose Michael's actions to Kimberly unless he lets Peter take the fall for sleeping with Brandi. Sydney inadvertently becomes a porno producer when she invests money with an old acquaintance of Bobby's.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Melrose Unglued
programme.desc: Amanda persuades Teri to drop the charges against Peter by making Brandi the spokesperson for a cosmetics company. Bobby's friend Jimmy tells Sydney that Alycia and Peter conspired to take Bobby down.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Peter's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Kimberly injects Peter with a paralyzing drug and has him committed to a mental hospital that she is temporarily running. Billy asks Jake to help him win back Alison.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Full Metal Betsy
programme.desc: Michael and Amanda hit the road in search of Peter and Kimberly. Jane blackmails Sydney into participating in her plot to murder Richard.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Dear Sisters Walking
programme.desc: Peter is saved from the lobotomy when Michael and Amanda break into the hospital, but "Betsy" captures them and locks them in the boiler room. Peter is arrested for Bobby's murder.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Living With Disaster
programme.desc: Richard torments Jane's conscience by leaving clues about the murder around her home and office. Detective Wylie tells Amanda that Peter is actually Dr. Peter Howell, who is wanted in Kansas City on charges of murdering his wife.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Over Dick's Dead Body
programme.desc: Jane suspects that Richard is still alive. Sydney suggests that they dig up the body to alleviate her sister's fears.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Moving Violations
programme.desc: Jane and Sydney escape when Jane hits Richard in the gut with a shovel. As a deputy is driving Jane and Syd to meet Samantha, they see Richard come out of a grocery store. Richard is killed in a shootout.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Hunka, Hunka Burnin Love
programme.desc: Peter fires Sydney after learning that she sold his house (which he had listed as a company asset) to pay the practice's debts. Peter has to move into Amanda's apartment.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Un-Janed Melody
programme.desc: Jane saves Jake and Alison from the fire. Jane apologizes for her outburst but later tries to seduce Billy to make the couple jealous.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Jane's Addiction
programme.desc: Jane slashes Alison's tires. Jake catches Jane following Alison and him and orders her to stop stalking them. Jane files a restraining order against Jake.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Big Picture
programme.desc: When his mother cuts off Russell’s trust fund, he gets a taste of how life will be after moving in with Timmy. Meanwhile, Audrey helps Jeff impress his boss in order to get a raise.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Fun Run
programme.desc: After Jeff tells his altruistic co-workers that requests for charity donations are getting out of hand, Audrey enters into a 10K charity event and plans on having Jeff's staff contribute money toward the cause.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Refusing To Budget
programme.desc: Timmy convinces Russell he needs a budget when the utilities are turned off in his apartment. Meanwhile, Audrey has a mentee who wants to see her office and learn about publishing.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Little Bummer Boy
programme.desc: When Russell decides to borrow a holiday concept of gift-giving from Adam, both Adam and his co-workers are in for surprises. Meanwhile, Audrey wants to make people laugh at Jeff's holiday party.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Home Stretch
programme.desc: When Jeff discovers that a guy is giving Audrey home Pilates classes, he wants to make a change. Meanwhile, Adam tells Jennifer specifics about his football past.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Uh-Oh It's Magic
programme.desc: When Russell takes his date to a magic show, the magician makes her disappear. Meanwhile, Audrey unknowingly slips up when she tells Brenda's girlfriend about the baby.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Singing and Dancing
programme.desc: When Timmy joins an a cappella group, he wants to keep it a secret from Russell. Meanwhile, Jeff and Audrey discover they have a new annoying neighbor.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Anniversary Chicken
programme.desc: When Jeff decides to surprise Audrey by remembering their anniversary, he's the one who ends up being surprised. Meanwhile, Timmy is forced to be Russell's interpreter on a date.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Jeff's Day
programme.desc: When Jeff proclaims it's 'Jeff Day', he gets his way until the cleaning lady arrives. Meanwhile, Adam has to figure out why his eye is twitching.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Zygote
programme.desc: When Jeff and Audrey see a fertility specialist with their surrogate, they discover a zygote. Meanwhile, Russell and Timmy go on double dates again.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Set Up
programme.desc: When Russell discovers Timmy has a sister, he aims to impress her. Meanwhile, Jeff and Audrey set their neighbor Liz up on a date.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Beating the System
programme.desc: When Jeff and Audrey learn their surrogate is pregnant, both of their lives change. Meanwhile, Timmy takes on the responsibility of wedding planner for Adam and Jennifer.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Jeff Photo
programme.desc: When an old photo of Jeff appears in an art gallery, he decides it's time to make some changes in his life. Meanwhile, Russell experiences a slump with women until he sees a familiar face.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Power Couple
programme.desc: Jeff is threatened when Audrey gets a raise and makes almost as much as he does. Meanwhile, Russell enlists Timmy to find out what Liz sees in another man.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Double Down
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey panic when they are told they might be having twins. Meanwhile, Russell throws a citizenship party for Timmy to impress a girl.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cheating
programme.desc: Audrey tries to persuade Jeff to eat healthier when he is diagnosed with high cholesterol, but he can’t help sneaking around with Brenda for unhealthy food.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: To try to show his care and interest in their relationship, Jeff sends Audrey on a scavenger hunt, as suggested by Adam. Russell thinks Jennifer has a sex tape and enlists Timmy’s help in finding it.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Last of the Red Hat Lovers
programme.desc: Russell books a cruise that he thinks is filled with 'red hot' ladies but instead, it's filled with ladies from the Red Hat society. Meanwhile, Timmy tries to help Jeff and Audrey settle an argument.
programme.sub-title: The Last of the Red Hat Lovers

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Dirty Talk
programme.desc: Russell tries to get out of his marriage to an overly enthused Liz, who tries to make it work, while Jeff attempts to engage Audrey in dirty talk.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Bros Before Nodes
programme.desc: Worried about getting his father's approval, Russell gets Liz all dolled up to meet him.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Audrey Is Dumb
programme.desc: Jeff celebrates Audrey's inability to talk after her node removal surgery. Russell gets Timmy to fire an employee for him, and Adam discovers he's only getting free stuff because of his good looks.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Nature Calls
programme.desc: Everyone spends a weekend in Vermont to watch the leaves change. During the trip, Adam gets poison ivy on his hands, Jeff has an embarrassing experience on the inn's computer, and Liz begins to realize that her marriage is a sham.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Shy Dial
programme.desc: Jeff uses an app on his phone that automatically puts his calls through to Audrey's voicemail. Meanwhile, Adam befriends a clothing salesman who helps him against his friends when he picks up some questionable clothing choices.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cheating
programme.desc: Audrey tries to persuade Jeff to eat healthier when he is diagnosed with high cholesterol, but he can’t help sneaking around with Brenda for unhealthy food.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Chair
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey engage in a battle of wills when she refuses to admit that she hates the armchair she ordered while Jeff pretends to love it.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: To try to show his care and interest in their relationship, Jeff sends Audrey on a scavenger hunt. Russell thinks Jennifer has a sex tape and enlists Timmy's help in finding it.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: A Big Bust
programme.desc: Audrey believes her maid needs an operation to correct the limp she has to be able to walk better, thinking she is doing the right thing Audrey asks her neighbors to contribute to the cause not having any idea what the money is really intended for.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: After The Lovin'
programme.desc: Frustrated by his boss blaming him for burning his mouth on hot soup, Timmy has a special spoon created for Russell. Audrey's plan backfires when she tries to seduce Jeff in the bedroom in order to get him to complete household tasks.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Missed Connections
programme.desc: Timmy wants to reconnect with a woman he met on the subway; Jeff and Audrey turn on each other when former friends snub them.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Five Things
programme.desc: Jeff can't think of five nice things to say about Audrey; Russell encourages Timmy to serenade a woman; Jennifer and Adam mistakenly get Jeff and Audrey's bank statement.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Meat Wars
programme.desc: Audrey drags Jen to a Bon Jovi concert to prove that she's still young and fun, leaving Jeff and Adam at home. Russell finds a phone number in his pocket and asks Timmy to investigate.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Goodbye Dolly
programme.desc: Audrey tries to prepare for motherhood by continuing to repair a doll that she keeps damaging. Meanwhile, Jeff questions whether the very pregnant Brenda should be dating anymore, and Adam tries to convince Jennifer that he is a manly man.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Audrey's Shower
programme.desc: Jen puts the wrong date on the invitations to Audrey's baby shower, Jeff likes Audrey's maternity clothes, and Russell gives up women.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Liz Moves In
programme.desc: Liz temporarily moves in with Jeff and Audrey. Jeff isn't happy with the new guest, but changes his mind when he discovers Liz consistently takes his side against Audrey.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Taking Names
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey realize that the names on their baby list are also the names of women that Russell has slept with. Adam becomes a cycling enthusiast after Jennifer suggests they start riding bikes in the park.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: Feeling lonely after her cat dies, Liz looks for a sperm donor. When Timmy's intellect and innocence don't attract his crush, he tries his hand at playing 'big dog.' Adam rips the vintage wedding dress that Jennifer's family sent her.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cupcake
programme.desc: Russell gets jealous when Timmy manages to outshine him at his own pick-up game. Adam and Jennifer leave pot-laced cupcakes on the kitchen counter, and an unaware Jeff eats one.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Fountain Of Youth
programme.desc: After meeting up with college friends who are no longer into partying, Jeff and Audrey set out to prove that even with a baby on the way, they can still have fun. Meanwhile, Timmy attempts to find Russell's compassionate side.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)
programme.desc: After four years of enduring Sabrina’s spells and strange behavior, Harvey finally suspects she is a witch
programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dreama, The Mouse
programme.desc: Brad’s witch hunting gene goes into overdrive when Sabrina comes down with Spring Fever.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Pilot
programme.desc: Sabrina’s Sweet 16 becomes a truly magical birthday when she discovers she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Bundt Friday
programme.desc: Under the influence of truth sprinkles, Sabrina learns honesty is the best policy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The True Adventures Of Rudy Kazootie
programme.desc: Big trouble comes in a small package when Sabrina takes a babysitting job.
programme.sub-title: The True Adventures Of Rudy Kazootie

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Terrible Things
programme.desc: Sabrina's good intentions turn bad when she uses her magic to meddle in other people's lives.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A Halloween Story
programme.desc: Sabrina faces a frightful dilemma when she must be in two places at once for Halloween.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dream Date
programme.desc: Something’s cooking when Aunts Hilda and Zelda use man dough to bake a date for Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: 3rd Aunt From The Sun
programme.desc: As fun Aunt Vesta, Raquel Welch shows Sabrina how the Other Realm half live.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Magic Joel
programme.desc: Sabrina’s job as a magician’s assistant is short-lived when she accidentally makes the boss disappear.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Geek Like Me
programme.desc: Popular Libby manages to turn being a geek into a position of power.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sweet N’ Sour Victory
programme.desc: Sabrina casts a spell on herself to become an instant Kung-Fu master.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A Girl & Her Cat
programme.desc: A Christmas Eve catnapping renews Salem’s love for his family.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Trial By Fury
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts use magic to show an unfair teacher that what goes around comes around.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Jenny’s Non-Dream
programme.desc: Behaving as mortals for just one night turns out to be more than the Spellman household can handle.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Through The Looking Glass
programme.desc: Sabrina's in a foul mood and only baseball great Brady Anderson can help her out of her slump.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years
programme.desc: Aunts Hilda and Zelda experience growing pains when they turn into teenagers for the night.
programme.sub-title: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Mars Attracts
programme.desc: A winter vacation to Mars and a cute ski instructor test Sabrina’s feelings for Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: First Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s first kiss becomes a test of true love when Harvey is turned into a frog.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: When Sabrina uses Libby’s likeness to promote a community service program, the real Libby manages to steal the limelight.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Cat Showdown
programme.desc: Salem enters a cat show to make some fast cash, but Sabrina uncovers a fur-raising scandal.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Meeting Dad’s Girlfriend
programme.desc: Love definitely isn’t in the air when Sabrina meets her dad’s new girlfriend.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: As Westbridge Turns
programme.desc: Sinister plots, tumultuous romance, danger, and intrigue – just another day at Westbridge High, after Sabrina casts a spell wishing for more excitement.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Great Mistake
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a little trouble when she sneaks out of the house after being grounded.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Crucible
programme.desc: Sabrina is put on trial for witchcraft when her class visits historical Salem, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Troll Bride
programme.desc: When Sabrina is tricked into marrying a troll, only a prince – a.k.a. Harvey – can save her.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sabrina's 17th birthday turns stressful when she has to start studying for her witch's license.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns about the responsibilities that come with using magic when she earns her witch’s learner’s permit.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A Doll’s Story
programme.desc: Babysitting becomes a test of ingenuity when Sabrina’s bratty little cousin turns her into a doll.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Boy
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party
programme.sub-title: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Inna Gadda Sabrina
programme.desc: A time ball sends the town of Westbridge grooving back to the 1960s.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Witch Trash
programme.desc: A family feud erupts when hillbilly cousins (Loni Anderson and Alice Ghostley) arrive from the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: To Tell A Mortal
programme.desc: It’s Friday the 13th, and for one day only, Sabrina can tell her friends she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves
programme.desc: Sabrina’s lack of attention with detail causes bad side effects to her magic.
programme.sub-title: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Claus
programme.desc: A special visitor from the Other Realm helps Sabrina recapture the true spirit of Christmas

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Schappert Identity
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Jason Bourne to test some of the best moments from the series of films.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Good, The Bad and Terry
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman’s noose.
programme.sub-title: The Good, The Bad and Terry

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Superheros
programme.desc: Holy Hollywood Weapons! Terry and Larry put some of your favorite Superhero’s to the test. Tune in to the same Bat Outdoor Channel for the results!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: All for One!
programme.desc: Terry travels back in time to see if he can make it as a Three Musketeer! Can he throw his sword and kill the enemy?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Dr. Jones and tests 1 scene from Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade containing 3 different tests.
programme.sub-title: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: RED-ish
programme.desc: Terry takes himself out of “retirement” to test some scenes from RED that will be extremely dangerous.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Nobody
programme.desc: We’re putting the action-packed film Nobody to the test. Booby Traps, Claymores and Riot shields make for an interesting day at the range.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River
programme.desc: Everybody loves a great western! Except Larry. Terry gets Larry to test more scenes from classic western movies!
programme.sub-title: Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Down Mexico Way
programme.desc: Don't mess with organized crime. The dynamic duo tackle scenes from the Mexico cartel series Queen of the South.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Just-Terry-Fied
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Nightmare on Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: Terry and Larry get to test several scenes from Horror films!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry’s Underworld
programme.desc: Terry and Larry are going to test a famous scene from Underworld with Kate Beckensale.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Equalizing Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test 3 scenes from Denzel Washington’s Equalizer films. Can Terry be as cool as Denzel?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Bond, Terry Bond
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier).

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: A Pirate’s Life for Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry go on a swashbuckling adventure when they test two scenes from the 1920’s film, The Black Pirate starring Douglas Fairbanks, Senior.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Silencing Terry
programme.desc: Terry wants to demonstrate how Hollywood has used different objects to silence a gunshot.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Saving Private Terry
programme.desc: Terry gets to relive part of his military carrier by attempting the famous sniper shot from Saving Private Ryan.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Jean Claude Van Schappert
programme.desc: Terry enters the world of Slow-Mo and explosions trying to imitate Jean Claude in Hart Target.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Breaking Terry Badly
programme.desc: Terry falls victim to Walter White in Breaking Bad, and Terry and Larry test 3 separate scenes from this iconic series.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Alone at Home
programme.desc: Who left Terry Home Alone! Larry did. Terry and Larry test several scenes from the classic film series Home Alone.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: D-Day By Air
programme.desc: Terry goes back to paratrooper school and will see how difficult it was for soldiers engaging the enemy while parachuting down to safety on D-Day.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: McSchappert
programme.desc: What can Terry do with just a paperclip? Probably nothing, but Larry and Terry will test several scenes from MacGyver.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Down Under
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Action Movies
programme.desc: From Polar, to James Bond, to Lethal Weapon, Terry loves action movies and is putting some of the best ones to the test!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Punishing Larry
programme.desc: Grenades, propane tanks, and a bathtub, all adds up to some big tests of the popular comic book character.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Leftovers Again?
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test things they never got to from other episodes. Pull up a chair and get ready for leftovers, and a surprise guest!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test different famous shots from westerns. Can you shoot a cowboy hat off the bad guy?
programme.sub-title: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Bond-ing with Larry
programme.desc: Who is the greatest international action hero of all time, Terry Schappert?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves 70’s Cop Shows
programme.desc: Terry travels back in time to the 70’s where he gets to relive his childhood dreams of becoming a 70’s TV cop.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Reacher
programme.desc: We’re putting Jack Reacher to the test! The movie, the series, and the pie!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Ex-Men: The Origin of Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a famous scene from X-men. They are attempting to see if you can split a bullet with a Katana sword.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Larry's Shadow
programme.desc: Larry gets sucked into Terry’s dark and mysterious world because Terry wants to test 2 scenes from the 1994 film with Alec Baldwin, The Shadow.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Pay Terry Back
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test 2 scenes from Mel Gibson’s film Payback. Mel's character is in the back of a taxi when 4 bad guys pull up next to him in an SUV.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Reindeer Game
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: S-Mart
programme.desc: Give me some sugar baby! Terry travels through time where he will test the cult favorite, Army of Darkness.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: We Hear Ya
programme.desc: Larry and Terry test several requests from viewers.

programme.desc: Watch all the death-defying battles, amazing competitions and ruthless gameplay on MTV's The Challenge, where competitors deal with hell on earth—and each other—to win big bucks.

programme.title: The Challenge: Riddle Me This
programme.desc: After a night out, two players take their rivalry to the next level, one team deals with communication issues during the Riddle Me This challenge, and two women are selected for the Inferno.

programme.title: The Challenge: Time to Ride
programme.desc: The teams race mini hogs through a complicated course in the Time to Ride challenge, and one woman is ripped out of the game following a loss in Patchwork at the Inferno.

programme.title: The Challenge: If Memory Serves
programme.desc: The two teams must pay attention to details in the If Memory Serves challenge, and one player fears their time in the competition may be coming to an end.

programme.title: The Challenge: Crab Grab
programme.desc: Two players are determined to win Life Shields as the teams compete in the Crab Grab challenge, and another person's time in the competition ends after a loss in Pegged at the Inferno.

programme.title: The Challenge: Heart Rate Bungee
programme.desc: Keeping calm is key as the teams face off in the Heart Rate Bungee challenge, and the final women's Inferno tests two players' abilities to push themselves to the limit in Spinner.

programme.title: The Challenge: Montezuma's Revenge
programme.desc: The teams compete in the final challenge, Montezuma's Revenge, an intense triathlon with a $150,000 prize that will determine this season's champs.

programme.title: The Challenge: Throwing Down the Gauntlet
programme.desc: The 32 competitors arrive in Trinidad and Tobago and learn being team captain comes at a cost, Robin throws Mark a birthday party and one player cracks under pressure.

programme.title: The Challenge: Derrick Steps it Up
programme.desc: One player quits the competition, the teams compete in the Chock Full of Coconuts challenge, and two veterans lock horns in the Gauntlet.

programme.title: The Challenge: We Can Work It Out
programme.desc: Another player withdraws from the competition, securing Kina's spot as rookie team captain, and Aneesa goes off on Cara.

programme.title: The Challenge: The 10,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: The rookies and veterans try to out-muscle each other in the Moving Pyramid challenge, and one player's erratic behavior makes him a target.

programme.title: The Challenge: Sloppy Seconds
programme.desc: Jodi has a meltdown as Mark and Robin's relationship heats up, things get too close for comfort in the Sponge Worthy challenge, and one player gives the bare minimum during elimination.

programme.title: The Challenge: Watching Paint Dry
programme.desc: The teams strategize to get a leg up in the Body Painters challenge, Alton gives his opponent a fair shot in the Capture the Flag elimination, and Brad and Derrick clash.

programme.title: The Challenge: The Heat is On
programme.desc: Beth and Montana's squabble destroys the veterans' morale at the Rickshaw Races challenge, and Ruthie is bested, giving rise to a new veteran team captain who puts everyone on edge.

programme.title: The Challenge: Rookie Moves
programme.desc: Both teams are on high alert after Jillian tells Kina two rookie players formed an alliance with veterans to throw challenges.

programme.title: The Challenge: Walking the Line
programme.desc: Jillian is at odds with Cara and Susie after telling Kina about the alleged alliance, and rivals Beth and Montana square off in the Reverse Tug-of-War elimination.

programme.title: The Challenge: Bucked
programme.desc: Jodi comes up with a winning strategy in the Buck-a-Neer challenge, which unexpectedly puts Syrus on the chopping block, and sparks fly between Alton and Jodi.

programme.title: The Challenge: Victory at Last
programme.desc: One team ends their losing streak at the Pull Me challenge, and things get physical when two feuding teammates face off in the Name That Coconut elimination.

programme.title: The Challenge: Tire Me Up, Tire Me Down
programme.desc: Alton struggles in the Spare Tires challenge, showing everyone he's only human, and Jeremy tries to dethrone the rookie team captain in the Capture the Flag elimination round.
programme.sub-title: Tire Me Up, Tire Me Down

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Fossilized Warrior  Part One
programme.desc: The 999 has to make an emergency stop at Fossilized Planet, a place petrified all the way to the tracks. Tetsuro is curious about the fossils and leaves the 999.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Fossilized Warrior  Part Two
programme.desc: Tetsuro rescues the fossilized warrior from a gang of thieves. However, the warrior runs off with Tetsuro's pass. He attempts to leave on the 999 along with the fossil of his lover, Lidya.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Laala from the Double Planet
programme.desc: Perfect Mechanization, a planet where all its inhabitants have taken on mechanical bodies. All its people look down upon flesh-and-blood humans.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Water Kingdom - Beethoven
programme.desc: On the Black Knight's Planet, Tetsuro is invited to live together with the Black Knight. When Tetsuro refuses, he frantically throws his lance at him! Maetel jumps to the rescue but he's his by the lance!

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Town of Fireflies
programme.desc: On the planet where people have the ability to glow, Tetsuro meets a struggling aspiring animation director named Fraiya. Tetsuro feels lousy after she rejects his offer to give her money.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Armored Planet
programme.desc: On a planet where all living things are covered in hard armor, Maetel is hit by an armored bug and is seriously injured.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Maetel of Mud
programme.desc: In the Mud Capitol, a city where the rain never stops, Tetsuro receives a phone call from a woman and is dragged out into the mud.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Kingdom of Atonement
programme.desc: In The Kingdom of Atonement, a town famous for its sanitation, the conductor is attacked by a mugger on his day off! Tetsuro and Maetel console him.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Souls of Professionals
programme.desc: On Professional, the planet of memories, Tetsuro ignores Maetel's advice, and makes eye contact with a professional hangman.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Tombstone of Dead Leave
programme.desc: The inside of Ballera has become hollow. Tetsuro and Maetel are swimming around in the air when they're attacked by some cowboys and it causes a big commotion.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Pirate Ship Queen Emeraldas
programme.desc: The 999 is raided by the pirate ship Queen Emeraldas. They try to put up a fight, but realize quickly that it is all in vain, and are forced to stop on the Pirate Planet.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Queen of the Primitive Planet
programme.desc: This world has been split up, due to a feud, into civilization and primeval society.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Planet of Dimensional Voyage
programme.desc: The Planet of Dimension Voyage travels across the galaxy at the whim of its egotistical queen, Egoterina.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: A Steel Angel
programme.desc: Masspron, a world covered in factories. The hotel Tetsuro is staying in is burnt to the ground.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Skeletons Song
programme.desc: Horohoro egg vendor who loses a piece of his body each time he is betrayed by his lover. He's to the point where his chest is completely hollow with the exception of a few bones.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Goddess of Children and Easy Birth in the Snow Capital
programme.desc: On this planet where snow never ceases to fall, Maetel and a straggling Tetsuro encounter a starving girl named Yuki.
programme.sub-title: The Goddess of Children and Easy Birth in the Snow Capital

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Great Writer of the Mirage Planet
programme.desc: Tetsuro and the gang touch down on the supposedly uninhabited Mirage Planet. There, they encounter the great novelist, Shosetsu Yoi.
programme.sub-title: The Great Writer of the Mirage Planet

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Sakezan Continent
programme.desc: On the Jungle Planet, the gang is captured by the alcoholic ruler, Sakezan. Maetel is chained up and forced to drink.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Ghost World Filament
programme.desc: The 999 stops on Filament, a planet filled with gas, due to interference from some ghosts. There, Tetsuro is kidnapped by a ghost parent-child duo.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Fury Planet
programme.desc: On the Fury Planet, a land where everyone is quick to pick a fight, Tetsuro slams into a tofu vendor as an assassin who works for Duke Mech, a friend of Count Mecha, targets him.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Bitten Planet of Stopped Space-time
programme.desc: The gang encounters the space warrior Edmond inside of the 999. His hometown, Sweet, Sweet Planet is shaped like an apple that has had bites taken out of it.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Ulatress Screw Mountain
programme.desc: Ulatres, a planet that specializes in screws. There, a woman named Lasen takes a liking to Tetsuro and imprisons him in the hopes of them living together.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Witch of Plated City  Part One
programme.desc: Plated City, a planet where people are considered poor if they aren't plated in gold. There, Maetel has her suitcase stolen by Wheel Lock, a young boy who wants to get plated.
programme.sub-title: The Witch of Plated City  Part One

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Witch of Plated City Part Two
programme.desc: Wheel Lock's mother is against the tradition of plating and is trying to form a resistance. As her dying wish, she asks Wheel Lock to continue the fight against gold plating.
programme.sub-title: The Witch of Plated City Part Two

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Great Chief Cicropros
programme.desc: In a ghost colony where no one is supposed to live, Tetsuro and the gang meet Dr. Cicropros and a legion of his clones.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Mii-kuns Mansion of Life
programme.desc: They say the planet named Mii-kun's Mansion of Life is a flower and animal-filled planet where the souls of beloved pets of children are brought to rest.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Empire of the Cowardly Elder
programme.desc: The 999 is in really bad shape on the Planet of the Cowardly Elder! And it's the doing of the cowardly president of the planet who trusts no one, Delmukade.
programme.sub-title: The Empire of the Cowardly Elder

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Kasumi of the Mist Capitol
programme.desc: The suitcase with Tetsuro and Maetel's passes is stolen. However, the thief collapses while making their escape.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Chief of the Spherical Housing Complex  Part One
programme.desc: Maetel is abducted by the Chief as soon as they arrive at the Spherical Housing Complex, a complex of spherical houses.
programme.sub-title: The Chief of the Spherical Housing Complex  Part One

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Chief of the Spherical Housing Complex  Part Two
programme.desc: Within the Chief's castle Tetsuro learns of some sort of secret and sees Maetel being subservient to the Chief.
programme.sub-title: The Chief of the Spherical Housing Complex  Part Two

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Female's Memories
programme.desc: As they approach the station, the Face of Memories, a woman passenger named Female causes a disturbance on the train and derails the 999.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Kira of Storm Hill, Arashigaoka
programme.desc: Tetsuro has his pass stolen on a planet where the wind never stops blowing. Tetsuro believes the thief to be a young man named Kira but Kira denies any wrongdoing.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Space Ride of the Valkyries Part One
programme.desc: At Deadwood Mountain, a young man named Prider arrived on a train in order to make money for his girlfriend Alice by music.
programme.sub-title: Space Ride of the Valkyries Part One

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Space Ride of the Valkyries Part Two
programme.desc: Tetsuro, haven been taken aboard the Valkyrie's mothership, tries to escape. Prider tries to defend Tetsuro and is stabbed by the Valkyries.
programme.sub-title: Space Ride of the Valkyries Part Two

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: El Alameins Singing Voice
programme.desc: Maetel, Nanmi, and Tetsuro go down to an ancient battlefield. Fully automated tanks which activate when they detect the presence of life have been left behind there

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Laws
programme.desc: When the twins try to teach their boyfriends a lesson, they learn that playing games don't always work!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Rosebud
programme.desc: At Tia's urging, Tamera attempts to join a snobby social club but soon learns that the group's president is determined to block her membership.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Ladies in Waiting
programme.desc: To beef up her college application, Tamera secretly rejoins her girlhood scout troop, the Frontier Girls, to complete her unfinished badge program.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Ladies' Choice
programme.desc: Tia defies Lisa's wishes and interviews for a job

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Young at Heart
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera go clubbin' to catch the show of one of their favorite singers

programme.title: Sister, Sister: I Had a Dream
programme.desc: A vivid dream Tamera encounters famous African-Americans who encourage her to pursue her dreams

programme.title: Sister, Sister: You Had to be There
programme.desc: Roger shares Tia and Tamera's most embarrassing moments with their boyfriends

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Prom Night
programme.desc: Lisa surprises the twins with homemade dresses for their senior prom

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Shoeless
programme.desc: With the help of her grandfather's horse-drawn carriage and a pair of borrowed shoes from Tia, Tamera stars in a '90s-style Cinderella story.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Graduation
programme.desc: The twins are graduating from high school, but the future doesn't look as bright for Tia's boyfriend Tyreke, who's having a tough time getting his high school equivalency degree.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Home Sweet Dorm
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera are off to college but they encounter housing problems during their search for the perfect dorm situation; Ray looks forward to remodeling their room

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Stop In The Name Of Fun
programme.desc: All work and no play makes Tia a dull girl... until Tamera signs her up for a spot on an MTV talent show!
programme.sub-title: Stop In The Name Of Fun

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Home Court Advantage
programme.desc: At Tamera's urging, Lisa hires a new assistant, Todd Banks, an attractive young male graduate who turns out to be lazy on the job. After a number of screw-ups, Lisa fires him.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: We Are Family
programme.desc: Ray's run for State Senate has his family up in arms after their lives become an open book in the press.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Grass Is Always Finer
programme.desc: Tia's crush on a handsome teacher leaves her shaken, stirred, and on the rocks with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Bum Rap
programme.desc: Tia's experiment has Jordan and Tyreke at each other's throats, while Tamera and her dad face off in a political showdown!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Domino Effect
programme.desc: Jordan and Tyreke find themselves escorting two young coeds to the Homecoming Dance --- until girlfriends Tia and Tamera decide to show up at the last minute!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Greek To Me
programme.desc: Tia faces a tough choice among competing sororities; while Jordan also learns a lesson about the Greek.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: My Father's House
programme.desc: Jordan confronts his fears when Tamera and friends convince him that love is a two-way street.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: For The People
programme.desc: Ray is frustrated that his political campaign is not allowing him the time to get to the heart of the issues with his constituents. His campaign manager has been driving Ray hard, and the results are starting to make an impact.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Twins Or Consequences
programme.desc: Tia gets cold feet after agreeing to take an exam for her twin sister.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Mixed Doubles
programme.desc: It's a game of musical dates as the girls' family and friends switch partners for a night on the town.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Two Guys, A Girl, and a Calendar
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera battle it out on behalf of their guys as competition gets tight for a spot in their school's 12 Most Gorgeous Men on Campus calendar.
programme.sub-title: Two Guys, A Girl, and a Calendar

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Sweet Talk
programme.desc: Tamera lands a job as a radio talk show hostess dispensing advice on love on romance, including her own sister Tia's -- but without Tia's permission!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Father's Day
programme.desc: The twins think a photojournalist visiting campus may be their biological father.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: I Know What You Did In Drama Class
programme.desc: Diavian and Tyreke become partners in drama class but Tia flips out after catching them in a passionate kiss during a drama rehearsal. Tamera and Jordan try to hook up cable in the girl's room
programme.sub-title: I Know What You Did In Drama Class

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Double Talk
programme.desc: Jordan's guest shot on Tamera's radio show turns into a full-time gig, but it may cost them their friendship.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Freaknik
programme.desc: Tia, Tamera, and Diavian all go to FreakNik in Atlanta during Spring Break. Tyreke races to Atlanta hoping to make up with Tia, but it may not be in time to save their relationship.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Before There Was Hip-Hop
programme.desc: An old-time jazz legend fuels dreams of the swing era for the class and dreams of heroics for Jordan.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Let Them Eat Cupcake
programme.desc: A series of mix-ups delays Victor's marriage proposal to Lisa

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Tia considers taking a summer internship with the WNBA in New York. Meanwhile, Lisa worries about her upcoming wedding.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Fly Away Home
programme.desc: Lisa gets cold feet on her wedding day, while Tia and Tamera entertain an anxious crowd waiting for the ceremony.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Meeting
programme.desc: Once separated at birth, identical twins Tia and Tamera, rediscover each other and scheme to live under one roof with their adoptive parents, who have nothing in common but their love for the girls.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: First Dates
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera vie for dates to the big school dance, while Ray and Lisa clash over the rules of the house.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Slumber Party
programme.desc: The boyfriend of one of Tia and Tamera's slumber party guests crashes the bash, while Lisa discovers that her beau is stepping out with another woman.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Cheater Cheater
programme.desc: Tamera cajoles Tia into helping her cheat on a test in order to win Ray's approval.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Wedding Bells & Box Boys
programme.desc: Lisa blames Ray for leading a bridal client astray, while Tia and Tamera see Roger in a whole new light during a double date.
